meta.title: Did Iran shoot down Israel's F-35s? What would it mean if they did?
meta.description:
According to reports in Iranian state media, the nation has now shot down at least three, but potentially four F-35I stealth fighters, the most advanced and capable tactical aircraft in Israeli service, while taking at least one female pilot into custody... And at least so far, it appears these claims are entirely fabricated. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews

https://www.nytimes.com/2024/09/04/business/media/iran-disinformation-us-presidential-race.html
https://www.inss.org.il/publication/iran-influence/
